short_description: 接任务、做判断、查知识、收口闭环的治理前台能力包

frontdesk_scenes.label: 给任务
frontdesk_scenes.prompt: 帮我研究飞书 claw 接入

frontdesk_scenes.label: 查资料
frontdesk_scenes.prompt: 帮我查飞书知识库里关于客户分层的结论

frontdesk_scenes.label: 审批
returns: 为什么现在该由人决定

tool_contracts.name: route_task
tool_contracts.description: Classify a natural-language task, choose the smallest sufficient skill chain, and persist the route bundle.

tool_contracts.name: ask_knowledge
tool_contracts.description: Query knowledge-first paths with source boundary preserved.

tool_contracts.name: close_task
tool_contracts.description: Assess closure readiness from the current frontdesk session state and optionally execute low-risk closure.

tool_contracts.name: get_run_status
tool_contracts.description: Read the persisted run bundle and summarize current route or closure state.

tool_contracts.name: list_frontdesk_capabilities
tool_contracts.description: List supported frontdesk scenes, minimal tool contracts, and install/readiness metadata.

tool_contracts.name: suggest_human_decision
tool_contracts.description: Frame a human-only decision with recommended path, anti-pattern, and reason for escalation.
